tasks.title: Find All Auth Implementation Gaps
success_criteria: Missing dummy bcrypt hash when user not found (timing attack vulnerability)
JWT payload uses 'userId' — should use 'sub' claim
JWT expiry is '7d' — should be '15m' for access tokens
No refresh token issued — only access token

tasks.title: Write the Refresh Token Rotation Handler
tasks.prompt: Write a TypeScript Express route handler for POST /auth/refresh. It must: validate the incoming refresh token, detect token reuse (Redis key already gone), rotate the token, and return a new access token. Include the reuse detection branch that revokes all tokens.
success_criteria: If key is missing: revokeAllTokensForUser and return 401
Computes SHA-256 of incoming token and compares to stored hash
Generates new access token (15m) and new refresh token
Stores new refresh token hash in Redis
